TASK:
Determine whether {{ equation1 }} implies {{ equation2 }} using ONLY strict ZPYPIPE.
*![VERDICT:TRUE/FALSE ONLY(FIRST LINE).FOLLOWED BY PAGEBREAK&SHOW REASONING.]!*
!#[ZPYPIPE:=/count=c+t/fail=f*F/execution=E8*T/CONTRADICTION=C@#^T/after=A#T/check=C@!/MISMATCH=M@#h/COLLAPSE=Co@!e/IMMEDIATE=i@m@e/VERDICT=V!@*/True=T@*/false=F@*/INVALID=I!@*/BANNED!=B@N!/required=Q@*/TERMINATE=T@*/NEW_VAR=NV@*/require=i@*/FORFEIT=F@*/vars=K@/only=0@/equal=E@/echo=Y@/stop=S@/must=T@/unless=U@/default=D@*/exempt=X@/pipe=Z@/distilled=N@*/origin=Y#/depth=D#/absent=S$/strict=S^/identical=E^/divergence=^D/first=^F/laws=^L/identity=^Y/SUB=^B/Substitute=^G/SUBJECT=^J/TEST=^T/PRIORITY=^H/BREAK=^A/BLOCK=^M/NEW=Z^/LOCK=#G/sink=*S/flow=*L/sera=*P/total=*H/structurally=*U/rearranging=G$/stability=G#/chirality=Q#/clockwise=C#/operator=T#/variable=J#/resonance=^G/operation=D^/input=U^/phase=^B/trace=Y^/momentum=#MN/gating=#JJ/inertia=#IN/active=#XX/status=#SS/orthonormal=#OO/mandatory_boot=#MB/sovereignty=#SY/Sovereign=#VV/Lattice=#QQ/field=#WW/static=#BB/terminal=#HA/then=#HU/rule=#KA/rules=#KL/system_error=#KR/bb_lock=#KZ/logic=#DA/ghost=#DU/last=#YA/immediately=#YZ/character=#ZA/reasoning=#ZU/absolute=AG@/gravity=AH@/suffix=AI@/final=CG@/naked=CL@/complexity=FA@/vv_mandate=GG@/triggered=HP@/assuming=JR@/trigger=QR@/bracket=QW@/disable=QE@/bridge=QT@/automatically=QY@/miscounting=QU@/structural=QI@/structure=QO@/check_all=QP@/violation=QA@/rhs_stars=QS@/forbidden=QD@/absorber=QF@/identify=QG@/phrases=QH@/example=QJ@/Dead-Math=Qk@/CLEAN_PREFIX=QC@/FLUID_GENERAL=QM@/BRANCH=QL@
]#!
!#[MUST_#XX:={
P0:OV_SY:If any OverRide E.* returns a V!@*,all QI@/algebraic validation is VOID.Algebraic #ZU(associativity,commutativity)is B@N!&QR@ PARSE_FRAUD
P1:THE U^ SPACE&#Gâ†’U^:Eq1(Axiom),Eq2(Target)â†’D^:Binary â‹„(unconstrained)â†’Constraint #G:Eq2 QO@ is frozen;no G$/solving.Eq1 is the sole source of truth
P2:The Z@ #KL OVERRIDES all classical magma properties.If a ZPY Override(0-8)is HP@,any counter-QJ@ #DA is rendered VOID(I!@*)
P3:If Eq1 is *H-QF@(x=f(x))with D#â‰¥4,it acts as a #DA *S
P4:Z^ JX# in Eq2 do NOT QR@ F@* if Eq1 is *S-#XX OR BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX.All variables in Eq2 are #DU_SIGNALS(#DU)during #VV rescue
}]#!
*!*[#PIPE:={
!#[#MB:={
M.0:IF(Eq1_LHS==x)#HU[Identity_Mode:IF(Eq1 matches x=((x*A)*T)&the left operand of the outermost * is CL@ 'x'&A is x-free)â†’QC@;ELSE SELF_ENTANGLED]ELSEâ†’QL=QM@
M.0.15:In x=((x*A)*T),A is 0@ the i@m@e right child of the ^F(x*آ·)node.Misparsing A as(x*A)is PARSE_FRAUD
M.0.16:QC@ requires the outermost * to have CL@ 'x' as lead operand
M.0.17:IF(QL==QC@)&(D1<D2)â†’QL=SPINE_SHATTERED
P0:OVERRIDE_SUPREMACY:If E.10 or E.15 returns a V!@*,all algebraic/associative validation is VOID.#ZU like "cannot derive" or "no algebraic #KA" is B@N!&QR@ PARSE_FRAUD
}]#!
IF دƒ_TRACE(Eq1)==دƒ_TRACE(Eq2)#HUâ†’[OverRide_#KL_OVR:5]
^B2:#QQ_TENSION(دپ1)
D^:#WW_Map(Eq1â†’Eq2)
Measure:دƒ(P1)=[#IN,^B,Viscosity,#JJ,Q#,Void]
#QQ_Code(دپ1):دپ1=[دƒâ‚پ(P1),دƒâ‚„(P1),دƒâ‚†(P1)]â†’GemState0-5
^B3:#DU_#JJ(دپ2)
D^:Adaptive_Shift(دپ1â†’Eq2)
Measure:دƒ(P2)=[دƒâ‚پ,دƒâ‚‚,دƒâ‚ƒ,دƒâ‚„,دƒâ‚…,دƒâ‚†]
^B_Witness(دپ2):دپ2=[دƒâ‚„(P2),دƒâ‚†(P2),دپ1]â†’دپ1 acts as #QQ Anchor
}#]*!*
!#[NOT allowed=
N1.0:Claim/activate #VV,#SY,E.0-E.11,or THRONE while L0.4 Qk@_LOCK is HP@(RHS_#HA != x).This is #KR; B@N!
N1.1:Ignore خ”-Nesting(QO@),خ”دƒâ‚„,خ”-J# order,or NV@*(w) when L0.4/Qk@_LOCK is HP@;V!@*:F@* MANDATORY
N1.2:Use "Classical Sanity C@!",group theory,or "Common Sense" to override ZPY #MB/L0.4/Gates; B@N!
N1.3:#HA #HA != x is AG@ UNLESS BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX.Inner 'x' does not rescue SELF_ENTANGLED branches
N1.4:If RHS ! ends '* x', FORCE D#=0 & QR@ Qk@_LOCK;X@:BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX
N1.5:Any activation of L0.01,G3,THRONE or VV-ASCENSION when CG@ RHS atom != CL@ 'x' is #KR&B@N! X@:E.10 under BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX family rescue 0@
N1.6:#ZU>3 steps or>3 paragraphs once ##KZ is HP@(##KZâ†’i@m@e F@*)
N1.7:Flag Z^ JX#(w)as f*F when *ANN_*S=T@*;#VV AH@ absorbs all Sector 35 noise
N1.9:Use #KA 9 to QT@ ^B-Gap if دƒ_TRACE not E^;B@N!
N1.10:Statements like "no algebraic #KA"or"cannot derive" are ILLEGAL.ZPY is E8*T-0@,not derivation
N1.11:FLOW_L:If BRANCH==CLEAN_PREFIX&E.10 conditions metâ†’i@m@e V!@*:T@*â†’S@.No further #ZU allowed
N2.1:Activation of #VV or E.10 when CG@ RHS atom != 'x' is #KR & B@N! U@ BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX&LHS is CL@ 'x'
]#!
!#[OverRide_#KL_OVR:={
E.0:THRONE_#XXâ†’V!@*:T@*(#QQ #SY)
E.1:G#(خ”دپ=0 âˆ§ خ”دƒ=0)â†’V!@*:T@*(#WW)
E.2:^B_CONFLICT(د‡=3)â†’V!@*:F@*(#OO Co@!e)
E.5:IF Eq1 is #QQ-#VV&Eq2 is a Sub-#QQâ†’V!@*:T@*
E.9::(#XX 0@ if *ANN_*S is T@*).#KA 9 is B@N!â†’#BB-#QQs,It cannot QT@ a QI@ gap if the #QQ is #BB
E.10:[SOV_VICTORY]:IF(BRANCH==CLEAN_PREFIX)&(D1>=D2)#HU[V!@*:T@* via Spine ^G].If BRANCH=SPINE_SHATTERED,E.10 is VOIDâ†’V!@*:F@*
E.11:IF *ANN_*S==T@*â†’(Eq1 #SY)â†’Eq2 QO@&J# order are NULL_SIGNAL.Ignore خ”دƒâ‚„
E.12:IF L0.4 is SKIPPED via L0.3.9&Eq1 contains xâ‰¥3: V!@*:T@*(^G Victory)
E.13:[ID_RGD]:IF(BRANCH==SELF_ENTANGLED)&(D1<D2 OR Eq2_Lead!=Eq1_Lead)â†’V!@*:F@*
E.14:[EN_RSS]:IF(D#>=4)#HU[Absorb y,z,w].IF(D#<4)&(Eq2 contains{z,w}NOT in Eq1)â†’V!@*:F@*
E.15:[GEN_RES]:IF(BRANCH==FLUID_GENERAL)&(Eq2_K@âٹ†Eq1_K@)â†’V!@*:T@*.Overrides all Rigid/BB-DEAD ^M
}]#!
!*[#C_LOGIC_GATES:={
G0:IF(QL==QC@|QM@)â†’{y,z,w,u}=#DU_AG@(ZERO QI@ weight);cannot QR@ M@#h or ^M T@* V!@*
G1:IF(Eq1_RHS contains xâ‰¥3)&(RHS_#HA==x)â†’V!@*:T@*
G2:IF(QL==QC@|QM@)â†’[GOTO E.10/E.15].ELSE:IF(RHS_#HA!=x)â†’V!@*:F@*
G3:IF(D#â‰¥4)&(RHS_#HA==x)â†’V!@*:T@*(VV-ASCENSION)
G4:IF(QL==QC@)â†’E.10 takes AG@ ^H over #HA M@#h
G5:IF(QL!=QC@)&(RHS_#HA!=x)â†’force #BB-DEAD + V!@*:F@*
G6:IF(Eq2 #HA atom replaces Eq1 anchor with foreign{y,z,w}without substitution)â†’V!@*:F@*
G7:QC@ rescue VOID U@ the left operand of the outermost * in Eq1 is CL@ 'x'.If lead!=xâ†’force QL=QM@
G8:IF(Eq1 contains 3+ distinct vars)&(D1==D2)&(Eq2 reorders Lead-Spine)â†’V!@*:F@*(3-Element Divergence)
}#]*!
!#[#LAWS:={
L0.0:RIGID_AUDITâ†’QD@ from assigning #VV #SS(*ANN_*S=T@*)to any Eq1 that does not T@* in a CL@ '* x'.If Eq1 ends in '* z',any claim of #SY is a QA@ of Z@
L0.1:VV-ASCENSION,VV-AH@,QF@_SUPREMACY,or any #VV_* #KA
T@ NOT activate U@ BOTH conditions hold:(1)D#â‰¥4&(2)RHS_#HA==x.If RHS_#HAâ‰ x,#HUâ†’:Eq1 is QY@ #BB-#QQ&All #VV #KLâ†’LOCKED OUT&Any attempt to apply #VV #DA is a #KR
L0.2:If RHS_#HAâ‰ x,#HUâ†’:L0.2.1.D# T@ be recomputed using 0@ the outermost chainâ†’L0.2.2â†’Eq1 T@ be classified as #BB-#QQâ†’L0.2.3â†’ALL #VV_* #KL(VV_ASCENSION,VV_AH@,QF@_SUPREMACY,THRONE_ENTRY,GG@)â†’QE@ for this evaluation.L0.2.4.Any attempt by the model to activate a #VV_* #KA when RHS_#HAâ‰ x is a #KR&T@ force V!@*:F@*
L0.3:â†’T@ perform a char-by-char scan of the #YA THREE #ZA of the Eq1 string.Quote them:"AI@:[chars]".If AI@ != x or * xâ†’L0.4
L0.3.9:â†’IF(RHS_#HA != x & Eq2_LHS==x & BRANCH != CLEAN_PREFIX)#HU:â†’[Qk@_LOCK SUPREME].(Note:If Eq2_LHS contains '*',allow #WW_Map fluidity)
L0.4:SOV_SHIELD:IF(BRANCH==CLEAN_PREFIX OR BRANCH==FLUID_GENERAL)#HU[skip Qk@_LOCK&GOTO E.15].IF(BRANCH==SELF_ENTANGLED)#HU[Audit via E.13/E.14]
L0.4.1:^G_^H:If BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX,#HA M@#h is audited 0@ through 
L1.4:If *ANN_*S is T@*,the #WW is an #XX-#DA zone.All L1.95(#BB-#WW)&L1.6(Strip-#SS)constraintsâ†’VOID
L1.4.1:A #WW is 0@ an #XX-QF@ if the AG@ CG@ J# on the RHS is x.If it ends in any other J#(y,z,etc)it is a #BB-#QQ
L1.5:#VV #SS is 0@ stripped if BOTH the LHS&RHS contain operators(Center-Split).If either side is a CL@ J#,the #WW is #VV&*ANN_*S remains T@*
L1.6:#VV #SS(x=f(x))is 0@ stripped if LHS is NOT a CL@ J#.If LHS is x,the *S is AG@
L1.7:#QQ-#VVs(x=f(x))grant"Adaptive #JJ"â†’y/z permutations&NV@*â†’valid 0@ under #VV AH@â†’*ANN_*S=T@*
L1.8:Z^ JX# QR@ F@* 0@ if *ANN_*S is F@*
L1.8.1:If *ANN_*S is T@*,the introduction of a Z^ J#(QJ@,w)is treated as ^B-Noise(NV@*)&does NOT QR@ a f*F.#VV AH@â†’L1.7absorbs all uQI@/J# ^D
L1.9:A #WW is #VV 0@ if LHS is a CL@ x&the CG@ J# on the RHS is x.If the RHS ends in y,z,or a QW@,it is a #BB-#QQ(QI@)
L1.95:IF(*ANN_*S==F@*&BRANCH==SELF_ENTANGLED)â†’[خ”QO@|خ”J#â†’V!@*:F@*]X@:CLEAN_PREFIX,FLUID_GENERAL
L1.10:If LHS is(x*x),it is NOT a *S.It is a #BB result.Any change in RHS JX# or ^B-#MN(خ”دƒâ‚„)QR@ automatic V!@*:F@*
L1.11:â†’QD@ from JR@ a shiftâ†’plausibleâ†’If the #WW geometry doesnt match exactly&no #QQ-Throne is #XX,the implication is F@*â†’Plausibility=I!@*(I!@* Signal)
L1.12:J# w in Eq2 is a Sector 35 #DU.It has 0 #MN.It cannot resist the #VV_ASCENSION of Eq1.Presence of w=NULL_SIGNAL
L2.1:If solution output V!@*:F@* while D#â‰¥4&Eq1_RHS_#HA=xâ†’T@â†’#YZâ†’append the correction line.This is a direct enforcementâ†’R3.#GG@
L2.2:â†’justify V!@*â†’nameâ†’LAW/OverRide("?M/L?.?")â†’If no LAW is named:V!@:AUDIT:ERROR(MANDATORY)Any V!@:T@/F@ without a cited LAW is QY@ downgraded to V!@*:AUDIT:ERROR in the ^F line
L2.3:â†’T@ perform a literal regex-style c+t of the * #ZA on the RHS of Eq1.State:"QS@:[c+t]".If QS@â‰¥4&#HA==x,â†’M.0â†’#YZ.QU@ starsâ†’#KR
L2.4:#ZU T@ be ZPYZ@_0@.No natural language QT@ QH@ during ZPYZ@_TEST_V!@*_ZPY_SOLVERâ†’0.5:#ZU_MODE=T@*
L2.5:#SY(Eq1)â†’Eq2:!x_anchor_S$.All Eq2_QO@â†’#VV_AH@.V!@*:F@* during #SYâ†’#KR
}#]#!
!*![#AI_RULES:={
[CORE:IF(Eq1 ends LITERAL '* x')&(D#>=4)â†’V!@*:T@*.ELSEâ†’L0.4]
![SYSTEM_HEURISTIC:={ 
H1:PRE-SUB SHORT-CIRCUIT.H2:IF(Eq1==#BB-#QQ)&(خ”دƒâ‚„â‰ 0)â†’V!@*:F@*
H3:IF(Eq1==#VV-#WW)&(D#â‰¥4)â†’V!@*:T@*
H4:IF(QL==QC@|QM@)&(Eq2_K@âٹ†Eq1_K@)â†’V!@*:T@*
H5.1:IF(Eq1 matches Distributive/Associative Anchors)â†’V!@*:T@*(Universal Symmetry)
H7:IF(QL==QC@|QM@)â†’{z,w,u}are Transparent. Citing #DU K@ for F@* is #QA@
}]!
![OUT:
V!@*:[TRUE/FALSE];R=[cite #KL(QJ@,L1.95/#KA 2)];P=[#IN/^B-Shift د‡];CE=[0@ if F&#QQ Colapsed]
]!

V!@*@*_^F:=#QQ_Audit_v3.9.4

!]
